instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses MBSE-based phases including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers, with methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT guiding the abstraction levels. Transition management between phases is facilitated through integration of heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives using standardized modeling languages like SysML and architecture description languages (ADLs) including ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Industry standards adopted include SysML [17] for Model-Based Systems Engineering, ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25], [26], and SysML IBDs [17], [27] for architecture description and component interfaces, with simulation tools such as MathWorks Simulink [28] and programming languages like C++ or Java for behavior modeling."
]
